# Universal Work Report — LIGHT Template

Use for small, reversible, documentation-only changes. Do not use for secret-sensitive, external-effect, irreversible, or merge-gate work.

## Identity
```yaml
schema_name: universal_work_report
schema_version: 1.0.0
work_id: <WORK-ID>
agent: <AGENT>
level: <LEVEL>
parent_id: <PARENT-ID|null>
track_type: <SEQ|PAR>
risk_class: REVERSIBLE
review_status: REVIEW-FIRST
merge_allowed: false
```
